allOf.description: Tenant application release: immutable effective snapshot at a version. Release metadata only; content is stored as TenantApplicationReleaseArtifactDefinition rows (app + copied extension artifacts, tenant overrides merged). Used for deployment.

tenantApplicationId.description: Tenant application this release belongs to.

applicationReleaseId.description: Base application release this tenant release was built from (for traceability).

domainModel.description: Optional DDD aggregate version for optimistic concurrency.
